hooks.command: [ -d .git ] || exit 0; [ -f .vault-meta/auto-commit.disabled ] && exit 0; git add -- wiki/ .raw/ .vault-meta/ 2>/dev/null; git diff --cached --quiet -- wiki/ .raw/ .vault-meta/ 2>/dev/null && exit 0; HKT=$(TZ='Asia/Hong_Kong' date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M %Z'); git commit -- wiki/ .raw/ .vault-meta/ -m "wiki: auto-commit $HKT" 2>/dev/null || true
